content:
# Reservoir Simulation

**Summary**: Numerical modeling of reservoir behavior over time to predict production and optimize recovery.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-ahmed|Ahmed, 2023]] used reservoir-simulation to scale up findings from core and pore scales to a field-scale model.

- [[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024]] applied reservoir-simulation to evaluate CO2 plume migration and trapping mechanisms.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024]] applied reservoir-simulation to evaluate CO2 plume migration and trapping mechanisms.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- VES improved the oil recovery by 10% and reduced the water cut by 47% in NFRs compared to waterflooding. ([[2023-ahmed|Ahmed, 2023, p. 24]])

- Simulation results showed that Case 3 (3D Geological Model) better captured the impact of heterogeneity on CO2 distribution compared to Layer Cake models. ([[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024, p. 100]])
